---
title: "Talk at MOPTA 2026"
date: "2026-08-18"
categories: [talks, conferences]
description: "Presenting at Modeling and Optimization: Theory and Applications (MOPTA) 2026 at Lehigh University."
---
Presenting *Nonsmooth Riemannian Optimization with Inexact Manifold Primitives via Bundle Methods* at Modeling and Optimization: Theory and Applications (MOPTA) 2026 at Lehigh University.
